positive: A mystical celestial compass radiating soft bioluminescent teal and gold light, floating above a stylized topographical map of abstract constellations. The compass needle is formed by a vibrant, stylized kraken tentacle. Background elements include delicate, geometric cosmic dust trails, etched starlight motifs, and overlapping mandalas of planetary orbits. The art should be rendered in a highly detailed, elegant Art Nouveau/Celestial Grunge style, emphasizing clean silhouettes and strong luminosity contrast. Central composition, perfect for a t-shirt print. Palette should be deep midnight blues, iridescent teals, antique gold, and crisp white highlights. Cinematic studio lighting, octane render, vector art texture, minimalist grunge overlay.
